productDisplayName: Converse Men Slim Smart Black Casual Shoes
description: These low top shoes are inspired by converse's lucky charm Chuck Taylor - Basketball player turned salesman. Iconic and synonymous with style and youth culture, these shoes reflect a fusion of sport and style. Wear this with form fitting denims, a monochrome tee and a casual jacket. Comes with a spare pair of laces Upper Canvas upper with stitch detailing for shoe structure Central lacing system with a long tongue for comfort Suede overlay on the toe box to protect the toe region Reinforced overlay at the heel region for good shoe structure Metal eyelets on the midfoot for ventilation Midsole PU midsole with branding on the heel Outsole Rubber outsole with terraced grooves and patterned lugs Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
